infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FoodRush Driver needs your location to show your position on the map and match you with nearby deliveries.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FoodRush Driver uses your location in the background to share your position with customers during active deliveries.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: FoodRush Driver uses background location to keep customers updated on delivery progress.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FoodRush Driver needs camera access to take pickup and delivery confirmation photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: FoodRush Driver uses your location in the background to keep customers updated on delivery progress.

plugins.cameraPermission: FoodRush Driver needs camera access for pickup and delivery photos.
